title: Unpopular war makes friendship with Trump a liability for Italy’s Meloni
summary_full: The war in Iran, which is deeply unpopular in Europe, has put Trump’s closest European allies, a constellation of conservative and populist leaders, on the defensive.
summary_public: The war in Iran, which is deeply unpopular in Europe, has put Trump’s closest European allies, a constellation of conservative and populist leaders, on the defensive.
